data.title: NeighborWorks® America grants New Jersey Community Capital $509,000 in Flexible Impact Grants to Advance Proven Housing Solutions
data.description: New Jersey Community Capital (NJCC) in New Brunswick, N.J., recently revealed it was awarded a NeighborWorks Flexible Impact Grant (NFIG) of $509,000 from NeighborWorks® America. This grant is part of a larger funding initiative, with NeighborWorks® America distributing a total of $78.8 million in NFIGs.

data.title: Blue Ridge Bank, N.A. Promotes Margaret Hodges as Chief Human Resources Officer
data.description: In Richmond, Virginia on April 27, 2026, Margaret Hodges has been appointed as the Chief Human Resources Officer at Blue Ridge Bank, N.A., a subsidiary of Blue Ridge Bankshares, Inc. Listed on NYSE American as BRBS, the Company. Margaret brings expertise as an HR executive to her new role.

data.title: U-BX Technology Ltd. Announces Pricing of $4.55 Million Registered Direct Offering
data.description: On April 27, 2026, U-BX Technology Ltd. (NASDAQ: UBXG), a prominent provider of AI-driven services to the insurance sector, has disclosed a securities purchase agreement with multiple investors. The agreement entails the sale of the Company’s securities at $0.30 per Unit in a registered direct offering, comprising one Class A ordinary share valued at $0.0016 per share and one warrant for each Unit to purchase 0.3 of a Class A Ordinary Share. The Offering is expected to yield gross proceeds of around $4.55 million for the Company.

data.title: Company’s 3-for-1 Stock Split Cleared by FINRA for OTC Markets Trading
data.description: On April 27, 2026, Qualstar Corporation (OTC: QBAK), specializing in scalable data storage and high-efficiency power solutions, received clearance from FINRA for its 3-for-1 forward stock split. This means the split will now be implemented in trading on the OTC Markets.

data.title: GTT: Notice of Availability of the 2025 Registration Document
data.description: The 2025 Universal Registration Document, which includes the Annual Financial Report, is now available for review. This document provides comprehensive information on the company's financial performance, strategy, and governance. Shareholders and stakeholders can access this important report to gain insights into the company's operations and results. The document can be obtained from the company's website or requested directly from the company. It is recommended that all interested parties review the document to stay informed about the company's activities.

data.title: Sound Community Bank CEO Laurie Stewart Participates in U.S. Treasury Department Roundtable on Financial Literacy
data.description: On April 27, 2026, in Seattle, Laurie Stewart, the Chief Executive Officer of Sound Community Bank, attended a roundtable discussion in Washington, D.C., as part of the U.S. Department of the Treasury's Financial Literacy Month. The event was also attended by U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, along with other officials. Community bankers from various states were present to discuss financial literacy.

data.title: L.B. Foster Company to Report First Quarter 2026 Results on May 4, 2026
data.description: Pittsburgh-based L.B. Foster Company (Nasdaq: FSTR) revealed plans to unveil its first quarter results for 2026 before the market opens on Monday, May 4. The company is scheduled to hold a conference call at 8:30 A.M. Eastern Time on the same day to delve into its financial performance, market projections, and recent business advancements. Following the earnings release, a presentation will be accessible on the firm’s website via the Investor Relations section.

data.title: Black Rock Coffee Bar CEO Mark Davis named 2026 EY Entrepreneur Of The Year® Pacific Southwest finalist
data.description: Since Davis took the helm, Black Rock Coffee Bar has performed exceptionally well and successfully completed its IPO. The company has seen significant growth, with revenue increasing by double digits and net income rising by over 30%. The IPO raised $50 million, attracting a wide range of investors. Davis’ strategic direction has been credited for the company's success, leading to a surge in its stock price post IPO. Black Rock Coffee Bar's expansion plans include opening 20 new locations across the country.

data.title: Kaldvík AS – Financial Calendar Update: Important Dates Released for Upcoming Events.
data.description: In the latest update, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has dropped from 6.2% to 5.9% last month. Approximately 250,000 new jobs were added to the market, with the majority being in the service industry. This increase surpassed expectations and has brought the total number of employed individuals to 155.6 million. Additionally, hourly wages have seen a slight increase of 0.3%. Overall, this data reflects a positive trend in the economy, indicating growth and stability in the job market.

data.description: An initial payment of $2 million has been made, with the possibility of receiving up to around $4 million in total proceeds upon the full exercise of warrants.

data.title: First Published Case of Alzheimer's Biomarker Reversal in a Chronic Lyme Disease Patient Using Dapsone Combination Therapy
data.description: The latest findings published in a peer-reviewed journal revealed a significant 63% decrease in phosphorylated tau levels following a nine-week oral protocol. The study, conducted by Richard I. Horowitz, MD, in HYDE PARK, N.Y., showcased promising results in Alzheimer's disease research. This development was shared in an article on April 27, 2026, through PRNewswire. The study was performed under the MSIDS Research Foundation's umbrella, marking a significant step forward in potentially combating this neurodegenerative condition.

data.title: From Auto China to Global, GAC Remains to be the Value Creator for Better Mobile Life
data.description: In Beijing on April 27, 2026, the latest news was announced by GAC International. They introduced an enhanced global strategy system during their inaugural global launch at Auto China 2026. This unveiling attracted significant attention, with around 330 attendees present.
